puzzles.title: Console Access
puzzles.description: Gain access to the main console on the bridge.

steps.description: Use a keycard or ID badge on the main console

puzzles.title: Warp Core Repair
puzzles.description: Repair the damaged warp core using the hydro spanner and a replacement coil.

steps.description: Use the hydro spanner on the warp core

puzzles.title: Decode the Ship Logs
puzzles.description: Use the data chip on the personal terminal to decode encrypted logs.

steps.description: Insert the data chip into the personal terminal

puzzles.title: Emergency Supplies
puzzles.description: Open the emergency locker in the corridor to find useful supplies.

steps.description: Use the multi-tool to pry open the emergency locker

puzzles.title: Telescope Observation
puzzles.description: Use the telescope with the lens cap and star map to find the uncharted system.

steps.description: Attach the lens cap to the telescope
Use the star map to align the telescope

puzzles.title: Send Distress Signal
puzzles.description: Use the comms beacon on the viewscreen to broadcast a distress signal.

steps.description: Activate the comms beacon at the viewscreen

puzzles.title: Survival Preparation
puzzles.description: Combine rations and water filter to create a survival kit.

steps.description: Combine ration pack with water filter

puzzles.title: Wall Panel Sequence
puzzles.description: Enter the correct sequence on the wall panel to unlock the engineering override.

steps.description: Enter the sequence: ALPHA, GAMMA, BETA

puzzles.title: Fuel Gauge Calibration
puzzles.description: Calibrate the fuel gauge using the hydro spanner in the correct order.

steps.description: Use the hydro spanner on the fuel gauge

puzzles.title: Star Chart Decipher
puzzles.description: Use the star map fragment to complete the star chart and reveal coordinates.

steps.description: Place the star map fragment on the chart
